More Than an Advisory Firm

A Bridge to Your Future in Namibia

Cantex Advisory is more than a consultancy it is a bridge connecting Americans with the vast, untapped potential of Namibia. Whether you are relocating, retiring, launching a business, or investing, we provide end-to-end support with people who live and invest in Namibia themselves.

For members of the African Diaspora, Namibia also offers something deeply personal a chance to reconnect with the continent, contribute to its growth, and build something meaningful in the land of your ancestors.

Who We Serve

Built for All Americans Including the Diaspora

Cantex serves every American ready to build a life or business in Namibia, and holds a special place for members of the African Diaspora seeking to reconnect with the continent.

D
The African Diaspora

People of African descent living in the Americas seeking to reconnect, invest in Africa's future, and build something lasting in the land of their ancestors.

R
American Retirees

Americans seeking a high quality of life at a fraction of U.S. costs in a safe, English-speaking country with reliable infrastructure and a welcoming expat community.

E
Entrepreneurs & Investors

Business-minded Americans looking to launch companies, invest in real estate, tourism, or agriculture, and tap into one of Africa's most stable and growing investment markets.

Plan Before You Move

Build Your Income Stream Before Making the Move

About Cantex Advisory

NamibiaIndependent since 1990 English-speaking
Our Mission

A Bridge Not Just an Advisory Firm

Cantex was founded because Americans interested in Namibia whether for relocation, retirement, investment, or cultural reconnection had no trustworthy, locally-grounded guide to help them navigate the process.

Led by Hendrick Kantewa, based on the ground in Windhoek, and supported by U.S. representative Jeffrey Lamie, our team offers firsthand experience, trusted relationships, and a clear path for Americans to participate in Namibia's future.

T
Fiduciary Transparency
Every referral incentive disclosed in writing before any commitment is made.
G
On-The-Ground Expertise
We operate from Namibia we know the market, professionals, and process personally.
U
Dedicated U.S. Representation
Jeffrey Lamie provides American-side support throughout the entire journey.
Our Values

What We Stand For

T
Transparency First

Every fee and relationship disclosed in writing before you commit. No hidden arrangements, ever.

Y
Your Interest First

We act as a fiduciary advisor. The right outcome for you always comes before the right fee for us.

H
Honest Expectations

We never oversell Namibia. You get the full picture real opportunities and real limitations.

L
Locally Grounded

Our advice comes from real, lived experience in Namibia not from reading websites abroad.

I
Internationally Minded

We bridge Namibia and the U.S. guidance that makes sense from both perspectives.

C
Community Driven

We are building a community of Americans in Namibia people who support each other and grow together.

Why Americans Are Choosing Namibia

How It Works

Our 5-Step Relocation Process

From first contact to arrival day a clear, guided process with no surprises.

01
-
Strategy Call

No-obligation session to assess your goals, budget, timeline, and eligibility.

02
-
Relocation Roadmap

A written plan covering your pathway, timelines, costs, and documentation.

03
-
Discovery Tour

Visit Namibia see properties, meet professionals, evaluate opportunities.

04
-
Legal Coordination

Applications coordinated through licensed immigration attorneys end-to-end.

05
-
Arrival and Settlement

You arrive in Namibia with residency secured and support in place.

Investment Opportunities

Invest in Namibia Through Cantex

Connect with vetted investment opportunities in Namibia's growing economy research, introductions, and strategic guidance from people on the ground.

Why Invest Here

A Growing Economy With Real Opportunity

Namibia combines political stability, strong legal frameworks, and fast-growing investment sectors creating genuine early-mover opportunities for well-informed international investors.

P
Full Property Ownership Rights

Title deed system gives foreign owners the same legal protections as Namibian citizens.

T
Growing Tourism and Business Sectors

Tourism, eco-lodges, retail, logistics all expanding with meaningful investment entry points.

E
Oil and Gas, Farming and Transport

Namibia is attracting major international capital in renewable energy early movers stand to benefit significantly.

S
Political and Legal Stability

Over 30 years of consistent democratic governance and a strong record of respecting foreign investment.

Ready to Explore?

Visit investment sites and properties in person
Meet local business professionals and partners
Understand real market conditions on the ground

Chat About Investment Tours
Investment Sectors

Sectors We Work In

We connect clients with vetted opportunities across Namibia's key growth sectors. Our role is strategic introductions and advisory not direct investment products.

R
Real Estate and Property

Strong title deed protections for foreign owners. We connect clients to reputable developers and real estate professionals in key growth areas.

T
Tourism and Hospitality

Guest lodges, boutique hotels, and eco-tourism ventures a growing sector with strong long-term potential in one of Africa's top safari destinations.

A
Agricultural Investments

Export-oriented farming and agricultural production an expanding sector with opportunities for well-capitalised international investors.

B
Local Business Partnerships

We introduce clients to vetted local entrepreneurs seeking strategic international partners in retail, logistics, services, and emerging industries.

Important Disclosure: Cantex provides strategic introductions and advisory services only not direct investment products. All potential investments are presented with clear risk disclosures. Independent legal and financial advice is always recommended before committing capital. Capital is at risk.

Discovery Tours

2026 Namibia
Investment Discovery Tour

A private, guided entry into doing business in Namibia with real opportunities, real partners, and real insight. November 7-14, 2026.

Reserve Your Spot
Windhoek, NamibiaCapital City of Namibia
Private Access to Namibia

More Than a Tour A Structured Opportunity

Designed for serious diaspora investors, entrepreneurs, and professionals, this curated 8-day experience offers a direct, in-country introduction to doing business in Namibia one of Africa's most stable, well-governed, and investor-friendly nations.

You will explore the capital city of Windhoek and the Atlantic coast of Swakopmund while engaging with business leaders, local partners, and decision-makers shaping the country's economic future. This is not just a tour it is a structured opportunity to gain clarity, build relationships, and identify real pathways to invest.

8
8 Days, 3 Cities
Windhoek, Walvis Bay and Swakopmund the full Namibia business and lifestyle experience.
G
Small Group, Maximum Access
Limited participants for maximum access, networking depth, and one-on-one advisory time.
L
Led by People Who Live Here
Your guide lives and invests in Namibia the advice is firsthand, not theoretical.
What You Will Experience

Adventure, Business and Culture Combined

Our tours are immersive experiences designed to connect you with Namibia's people, places, and opportunities in a meaningful way. Not just sightseeing strategic, structured, and transformational.

RE
Real Estate Tours

Tour homes, land, hotels, agricultural plots, and office buildings in Windhoek and on the Namibian coast. Evaluate live investment opportunities with expert guidance on-site.

BF
Private Business Forum

A full conference day with presentations from local government officials and business leaders. Learn about Namibia's economy, investment environment, and opportunities firsthand.

CI
Cultural Immersion

Windhoek city walk, souvenir shopping, cultural experiences, and meaningful connections with local entrepreneurs and the wider Namibian community.

CB
Coastal Business and Leisure

Real estate tours and a boat cruise with champagne in Walvis Bay. Experience Swakopmund Namibia's beautiful Atlantic coastal city with its unique German colonial architecture.

AD
Optional Adventure Day

Choose your own adventure hot air balloon ride over the desert, quad biking the dunes, camel ride, or a luxury spa day. Namibia has something for everyone.

NW
Networking and Connections

Build relationships with a select group of like-minded investors and diaspora members. The connections you make on this tour are as valuable as the opportunities you discover.

Day by Day

The Full Itinerary

Windhoek Days 1 to 4
D1
Arrival in Windhoek
Airport pickup, hotel check-in, welcome dinner with the group.
D2
Windhoek City and Cultural Tour
Explore neighborhoods, city walk, cultural experiences, souvenir shopping.
D3
Business Conference Day
Learn from local government officials and business leaders shaping Namibia's economy.
D4
Real Estate Tours
Explore Windhoek real estate and meet business leaders seeking investment partners.
Coast Days 5 to 9
D5
Travel to Swakopmund
Stop at Okahandja for biltong, beach leisure time, dinner by the Atlantic Ocean.
D6
Coastal Business and Leisure
Real estate tours and boat cruise with champagne in Walvis Bay.
D7
Free Day and Optional Adventures
Choose: dunes, beach, hot air ballooning, or spa. Your day, your way.
D8
Return to Windhoek
Morning travel with a farewell reflection and group dinner.
D9
Departures
Transfers to Hosea Kutako International Airport. Until next time.

Founder and Lead Advisor

Relocation AdvisoryInvestment IntroductionsCorporate RelationsStrategic AdvisoryInternational Partnerships

Hendrick Kantewa is the founder of Cantex Advisory and your primary advisor on the ground in Namibia. He also serves as a Fundraising Officer at the Namibia University of Science and Technology (NUST), where he has built extensive corporate partnerships and professional networks across Namibia's business community. Specialising in international partnerships, relocation advisory, and investment introductions, he brings deep on-the-ground experience in Namibia's business, legal, and property landscape.

He founded Cantex after identifying a clear gap: Americans serious about Namibia had no honest, locally-grounded guide to help them navigate the process. He lives and invests in Namibia which means his advice comes from real, firsthand experience, not theory.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What visa options are there for Americans moving to Namibia?v
Namibia offers a 6-month digital nomad visa and a 2 to 5 year renewable investor visa for those with a business in the country. Applications can take a few months to process we recommend planning and applying early. Our team assists with the full process.
Can Americans buy property in Namibia?v
Yes. Namibia allows foreign nationals to own freehold property with full title deed protection among the strongest property rights for foreigners anywhere in Africa. We connect clients with trusted local property professionals.
What is the cost of living in Namibia?v
Namibia's cost of living is significantly lower than the United States especially for housing, food, and domestic services. We provide a detailed cost-of-living breakdown during your relocation consultation, including real budgeting data and home pricing.
Is Namibia safe for Americans?v
Yes. Namibia is consistently ranked among the safest countries in Southern Africa, with a stable government, functioning legal system, and a welcoming attitude toward international residents.
How is Cantex different from other advisory firms?v
We live and invest in Namibia ourselves. Our advice comes from real, firsthand experience not from reading government websites in another country. Every referral fee we earn is disclosed to you in writing before you commit anything. We act as a fiduciary, not a salesperson.
Does Cantex provide legal or financial advice?v
No. Cantex provides business advisory services only. We coordinate with licensed Namibian immigration attorneys and always recommend independent financial advice before any investment decisions are made.
Legal Disclaimer
Cantex is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice. All immigration processes are coordinated through licensed Namibian immigration attorneys.
All referral incentives and partnership arrangements are disclosed in writing to clients before any commitment is made.
Cantex does not promote citizenship-by-investment programmes. Namibian citizenship is a separate and non-guaranteed process.
Residency permits do not automatically grant work authorisation. Independent legal and financial advice is always recommended before committing capital.
